description_long: This is a round, twisted bread ring with a golden-brown crust, generously sprinkled with sesame seeds and possibly other seeds. The surface is slightly glossy and uneven, with visible scoring and deep creases from the twisted dough. The bread appears to have a soft, airy interior, visible through the gaps and torn sections in the crust. The crust is moderately thick and has a rustic, artisanal appearance, with some areas darker than others due to baking. The overall shape is toroidal, with a central hole and a braided or twisted structure. There is no visible packaging, branding, or labeling on the bread.
description: A round, twisted bread ring with a golden-brown, seeded crust and a soft, airy interior. The surface is rustic and uneven, with visible scoring and a braided appearance.
description_view_0: This view highlights the twisted, braided structure and the generous sprinkling of seeds on the golden-brown crust.
description_view_1: The central hole and the deep creases of the twisted dough are most visible from this angle, emphasizing the bread's toroidal shape.
description_view_2: This side view shows the uneven, rustic crust and the contrast between the darker and lighter baked areas.
description_view_3: The underside of the bread is visible here, showing a smoother, less seeded surface and the thickness of the crust.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust features a twisted, braided pattern with deep creases and is generously sprinkled with sesame seeds. The surface is rustic, uneven, and has a slightly glossy finish with some darker baked areas.
